headline: Eye Clinic in KK Nagar, Chennai
subheadline: A neighborhood eye clinic serving KK Nagar and the surrounding area -- comprehensive, evidence-based eye care from AIIMS-trained Dr. Rajeswari, close enough to walk or a short drive from home.
metaDescription: Eye clinic in KK Nagar, Chennai -- comprehensive eye checkups, cataract surgery, LASIK, and more. Near KM Hospital, Double Tank Road. Book your visit.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Genuinely Local
whyPatientsChoose.description: Right here in KK Nagar -- no need to travel across the city or fight traffic for routine eye care.

processSteps.title: Walk In or Book Ahead
processSteps.description: Visit us on Double Tank Road in KK Nagar, or book a slot online to avoid waiting.

processSteps.title: Complete Evaluation
processSteps.description: Vision testing, eye pressure check, and a detailed examination tailored to your concern.

processSteps.title: Clear Next Steps
processSteps.description: We explain exactly what we found and what -- if anything -- needs to be done next.

landingFaqs.question: Is this clinic actually in KK Nagar, or is that just a service area you cover?
landingFaqs.answer: We're physically located in KK Nagar itself, on Double Tank Road, close to KM Hospital and PSBB School KK Nagar -- not a satellite location or a service-area listing.

landingFaqs.question: Do I need an appointment, or can I just walk in?
landingFaqs.answer: Walk-ins are welcome, but booking ahead online means you're seen at your slot time instead of waiting. For anything urgent, call us directly and we'll fit you in.

landingFaqs.question: Is this a general eye clinic or do you only handle specific conditions?
landingFaqs.answer: We're a comprehensive eye clinic -- routine checkups, glasses prescriptions, and screening, through to cataract, LASIK, glaucoma, retina, squint, and pediatric eye care, all under the same doctor.

doctorsPerspectiveStructured.patientConcern: Many patients tell me they've been putting off an eye checkup simply because the nearest clinic felt like a city-wide trip -- traffic, parking, half a day gone.
doctorsPerspectiveStructured.response: That's exactly why we're here in KK Nagar. Whether it's a routine checkup for the family or something more specific, you shouldn't have to treat a basic eye exam like a major outing. I'd rather see you for a five-minute concern early than have you wait months because the clinic felt inconvenient.
